description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-build-images:doc-gitlab-com and sets the variable PROGRESS to '1'. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs the commands: ruby -v, ruby generate.rb, and for i in `find public -name README.html`; do ln -sf README.html $(dirname $i)/index.html; done. The pages job publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, configures the environment named production with URL https://docs.gitlab.com, and is limited to the master branch.
